identificationModule.briefTitle: the Effects of YangXinShi (YXS) on the Quality of Life and Exercise Tolerance in Patients With Chronic Heart Failure
identificationModule.officialTitle: the Effects of YangXinShi (YXS) on the Quality of Life and Exercise Tolerance in Patients With Chronic Heart Failure

descriptionModule.briefSummary: The investigators set out to evaluate the effects of the traditional Chinese medicinal mixture under the brand name YangXinShi (YXS) on the prognosis in patients with chronic heart failure when it is combined with the optimal combination drug treatment of heart failure.

interventions.name: YanXinShi placebo pills
interventions.description: participants will take matched 1800 mg YXS placebo pills TID in addition to the optimal combination drug treatment of heart failure

interventions.name: YanXinShi pills
interventions.description: participants will take 1800 mg YXS pills TID in addition to the optimal combination drug treatment of heart failure

interventions.name: Trimetazidine pills
interventions.description: participants will take 20mg Trimetazidine pills TID in addition to the optimal combination drug treatment of heart failure

interventions.name: YanXinShi and Trimetazidine pills
interventions.description: participants will take 1800 mg YXS and 20 mg Trimetazidine pills TID in addition to the optimal combination drug treatment of heart failure

primaryOutcomes.description: health status measured in therms of five dimensions with the 5-level scale from 1-5, corresponding to having no problems and having extreme problems
visual analogue scale (VAS) of EQ-5D Questionnaire scaled from 0-100, corresponding to the worse and the best health imagined

secondaryOutcomes.measure: change in disease specific quality of life
secondaryOutcomes.description: assessment of disease-related QoL using Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire (KCCQ-12) with 7 heart failure domains. Scores of each domain are scaled from 0-100, with 0 corresponding to the worst, 100 the best status.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: change in left ventricular end-systolic diameters (in millimeters)
change in left ventricular end-diastolic diameters (in millimeters)
change in left ventricular ejection fraction (in percentage)

secondaryOutcomes.description: assessed by the distance (in meters) walked on 6-minute walk test
measured as (volume of O2 (ml) consumption/kg/min) / (3.5 ml VO2/kg/min)

secondaryOutcomes.measure: change in plasma N-terminal pro-B-type natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP) levels (in pg/ml)

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* patients newly diagnosed with heart failure or have been diagnosed with chronic heart failure
* patients classified as NYHA II-IV (New York Heart Association)

Exclusion Criteria:

* with severe liver or renal dysfunction
* with severe systematic conditions such as infection, malignant hypertension etc.
* hemodynamic instability (arrhythmia, acute cardiac infarction, aortic dissection etc.)
* not cooperating due to psychomotor deficiency, or with contraindications for exercise testing

overallOfficials.name: qin yu, M.D., Ph.D.
overallOfficials.affiliation: Affiliated Zhongshan Hospital of Dalian University

locations.facility: Dept. of Cardiology, Affiliated Zhongshan hospital of Dalian University
